title.uz: API bilan osongina ishlaydigan frontendni qanday rejalash kerak
title.en: How to plan a frontend that stays easy to connect with APIs

excerpt.uz: JSON mock data, data-access layer va UI separation orqali frontendni kelajakka tayyorlash haqida.
excerpt.en: How JSON mock data, a data-access layer, and UI separation keep your frontend future-proof.

content.uz: Ko'p loyihalarda frontend tez yoziladi, ammo keyin API bilan ulash paytida komponentlar, ma'lumot strukturalari va sahifalar chalkashib ketadi.
content.en: In many projects the frontend is built quickly, but once API integration starts, components, data shapes, and pages become tangled.

content.uz: UI qatlamini data qatlamidan erta ajratish keyinchalik katta vaqtni tejaydi.
content.en: Separating the UI layer from the data layer early saves major time later.

content.uz: export function getLatestPosts() {\n  return blogPosts.sort((a, b) => b.publishedAt.localeCompare(a.publishedAt));\n}
content.en: export function getLatestPosts() {\n  return blogPosts.sort((a, b) => b.publishedAt.localeCompare(a.publishedAt));\n}

content.uz: Aynan shu portfolio loyihada ham UI bevosita JSON fayllarga yopishib qolmaydi. Orada data layer bo'ladi va shu qatlam keyinchalik Python API bilan almashtiriladi.
content.en: In this portfolio project, the UI does not bind directly to JSON files. A dedicated data layer sits in between and can later be swapped with a Python API.

content.uz: Natijada sahifalar kamroq o'zgaradi, test qilish osonlashadi va admin yoki blog kabi bo'limlar mustaqil rivojlantiriladi.
content.en: As a result, pages change less, testing becomes simpler, and sections like admin or blog can evolve independently.

message.uz: Data layer g'oyasi juda foydali ekan.
message.en: The data-layer idea is really useful.

message.uz: Mock data bilan boshlab API'ga o'tish men uchun ham qulay.
message.en: Starting with mock data and moving to an API works well for me too.

excerpt.uz: Kod muammolari uchun muhokama interfeysi faqat chat emas, balki tuzilgan fikrlash vositasi bo'lishi kerak.
excerpt.en: For code problems, a discussion interface should be more than chat; it should support structured thinking.

content.uz: Chap sidebar, title, muammo tavsifi va javoblar oqimi foydalanuvchining e'tiborini saqlaydi.
content.en: A left sidebar, clear title, problem description, and answer flow help users stay focused.

content.uz: Yaxshi discussion UI savol beruvchi va javob beruvchini bir xil darajada qulay his qildiradi.
content.en: A good discussion UI makes both the asker and the responder feel equally supported.
